read_policy: Use this file for active backlog, next actions, scanner counts, and stable debt ids. Do not reread archived markdown history unless a debt id points there.

notes: The one widget timing match is the intentional centralized pumpFeatureUi helper.
Feature tappable scanner now skips built-in labeled buttons, tooltipped controls, and tappables already wrapped in Semantics or Tooltip.
Legacy spacing migration should be piecemeal and touch-driven.

pending.title: Fix profile tab and preview tab blank rendering
pending.summary: ProfileScreen still has a route-level NestedScrollView/sliver composition risk. The profile tab body should be sliver-native or restored as the actual inner scroll view, and preview constraints must stay finite.

pending.title: Piecemeal legacy spacing migration
pending.summary: Replace legacy Sizes.p* with CatchSpacing.s* where layouts are on the 4-point scale. Keep Sizes.p* for intentional fine-grained compatibility spacing.

pending.title: Keep docs index and registry synchronized
pending.summary: Whenever a durable doc owner is added, renamed, archived, or deleted, update docs/README.md, doc_versions.json, and doc_summaries.json in the same pass.

completed.title: Audit remaining feature tappable candidates
completed.summary: Reviewed the 24 syntactic tappable candidates. Existing controls already had user-visible text, tooltips, or Semantics wrappers, so the useful fix was scanner refinement. The scanner now reports zero unresolved tappable candidates.
